user.title: Global Caché iTach
user.description: Enter the IP address or hostname of your iTach (TCP port 4998 by default).

pick_device.title: Select gateway
pick_device.description: Choose a gateway discovered on your network, or enter an address manually.

dhcp.title: Discovered Global Caché gateway
dhcp.description: A Global Caché device was found on your network ({host}).

discovery.title: Discovered Global Caché gateway
discovery.description: A Global Caché device was found on your network ({host}).

reconfigure.title: Update connection
reconfigure.description: Change the gateway IP or hostname. The integration will reconnect and refresh device capabilities.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect or query the device. Check the address, port, and network.

abort.already_in_progress: Setup for this gateway is already in progress.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect or query the discovered device.

init.title: iTach options
init.description: Adjust IR defaults, timeouts, remotes, relays, or serial ports.

edit_remote.title: Edit remote
edit_remote.description: Choose a remote to change its name, IR connector, or command list.

edit_relay.title: Edit relay
edit_relay.description: Change name or module/port for a configured relay.

edit_serial.title: Edit serial port
edit_serial.description: Change name, connector, line settings, or preset buttons.

send_raw.name: Send raw TCP command
send_raw.description: Send an ASCII line to port 4998 and collect responses for a short time.

command.name: Command
command.description: Command line (carriage return is added if missing).

collect_seconds.name: Collect duration
collect_seconds.description: How long to buffer response lines after sending.

sendir.name: Send structured sendir
sendir.description: Send a full sendir with explicit parameters.

receive_ir.name: IR receive mode
receive_ir.description: Enable or disable receiveIR streaming for automations.

set_ir.name: Set IR port mode
set_ir.description: Apply set_IR mode (IR, SENSOR, IR_BLASTER, etc.).

send_command.name: Send TCP command (alias)
send_command.description: Same as send_raw; for parity with Global Caché documentation naming.

set_led_lighting.name: Set LED lighting
set_led_lighting.description: set_LED_LIGHTING for a connector in LED_LIGHTING mode (intensity 0–100, ramp 0–10).

send_serial.name: Send serial payload
send_serial.description: Send on the serial data port (control port + module).

pulse_relay.name: Pulse relay
pulse_relay.description: Turn relay on briefly then off.
